headline: Musk says SpaceX could bring $1 trillion in revenue by 2030
summary: Elon Musk said on Sunday that his rocket company, SpaceX, ‌could bring in $1 trillion in revenue ‌by 2030, making the statement two days after the ​company went public, valuing it at over $2 trillion.  "And I would be surprised if revenue is not greater than $1T in 2031," he ‌wrote on his ⁠social media platform X, replying to journalist and financial commentator Jon Erlichman.  SpaceX ⁠on Friday became the sixth-largest U.S. firm, cementing Musk's status as the world's first ​trillionaire.

content.title: Musk says SpaceX could bring $1 trillion in revenue by 2030
content.summary: Elon Musk said on Sunday that his rocket company, SpaceX, ‌could bring in $1 trillion in revenue ‌by 2030, making the statement two days after the ​company went public, valuing it at over $2 trillion.  "And I would be surprised if revenue is not greater than $1T in 2031," he ‌wrote on his ⁠social media platform X, replying to journalist and financial commentator Jon Erlichman.  SpaceX ⁠on Friday became the sixth-largest U.S. firm, cementing Musk's status as the world's first ​trillionaire.

headline: Broadcom (AVGO) Stock After Record Q2 And Cautious AI Guidance Is The Valuation Gap Widening Or Closing
summary: Why Broadcom’s record quarter was followed by a sharp stock pullback Broadcom (AVGO) just posted record Q2 revenue of US$22,187 million and net income of US$9,310 million, yet the stock slid as investors reacted to next quarter’s guidance and shifting sentiment around AI chips. headline: Chip startup Tensordyne expects $200 million in orders for AI system to rival Nvidia
summary: Tensordyne said on Monday it expects more than $200 million in orders for ‌its new inference system, as the AI chip ‌startup positions itself as a direct challenger to Nvidia in a ​fast-growing but increasingly power-hungry market.  Its Tensordyne Napier chip, developed in collaboration with Broadcom  and HPE-owned Juniper Networks, is being manufactured by TSMC, the world's leading contract chipmaker.
